name: Sweet and Sour Soybeans
recipeIngredient: 1 Sweet-sour sauce (see below)        1 ea Green pepper
2 tbsp Salad oil                         3/4 c Fresh pineapple chunks
1 each Large onion cut into 1-inch squares          2 ea Tomatoes, cut into wedges
2 each Large carrots cut into 1/4 inch slices    2 1/2 c Cooked soybeans
recipeInstructions:
Seeded and cut into 1-inch squares
or canned pineapple chunks drained
3 to 3-1/2 hours cooking time after sooking
Prepare sweet-sour sauce and reserve.
In a bowl combine 1-1/2 tsp each cornstarch, soy sauce, and dry sherry; 1/2 cup each brown sugar and wine vinegar; and 1/3 cup vegetable stock. In a large skillet, sauté onion until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook stirring for another 3 minutes or until onions are crisp-tender. Add green pepper and cook for 1 minute. Add pineapple, tomatoes, and soybeans and cook for 2 minutes or until hot. Stir in sweet-sour sauce, pour into the skillet, and continue to cook, stirring, until sauce bubbles and thickens.
Per serving: 10 grams protein, 72 grams carbohydrate, no cholesterol, 391 calories
